heading: Incidental expenses of law library
label: 134 Incidental expenses of law library
text: The incidental expenses of the law library shall be paid out of the appropriations for the Library of Congress.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 83 derived from , .act July 14, 1832, ch. 221, § 34 Stat. 579
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 83 derived from , .act July 14, 1832, ch. 221, § 34 Stat. 579
